system.description:
When you **_have your allies fortify a position and lie in wait for battle_**, hold 1 Surprise if you're rushed or 2 Surprises if you can take your time.

Once battle is joined, spend 1 Surprise to reveal a ploy, defense, or dirty trick you prepared in advance and roll +INT: **on a 10+**, it works as well as can be expected, and you've still got a few tricks up your sleeve—regain 1 Surprise; **_on a 7-9_**, it works as well as can be expected.

success.value: It works as expected, and you regain 1 Surprise.
